# @3df-spa/ui + @3df-spa/charts — LLM Reference

> Complete API reference for AI assistants. Use this to help consumers use these packages correctly.

## Overview

`@3df-spa/ui` — Vue 3 component library with 199+ components. TypeScript strict, Tailwind CSS v4, zero scoped styles. **v1.5.0**
`@3df-spa/charts` — SVG chart library for Vue 3. Zero external dependencies. 6 chart types.

Both are published publicly to npmjs.org under the `@3df-spa` scope.

---

## Installation

```bash
# UI components + required peers
pnpm add @3df-spa/ui class-variance-authority clsx tailwind-merge

# Charts (optional, zero deps)
pnpm add @3df-spa/charts

# Optional peers (only if using Calendar/DatePicker)
pnpm add date-fns

# Optional peers (only if using Carousel)
pnpm add embla-carousel
```

---

## CSS Setup (choose one)

### Option A — Pre-compiled CSS (recommended, no Tailwind needed)
```css
@import '@3df-spa/ui/styles.css';
```

### Option B — With your own Tailwind CSS v4
```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@3df-spa/ui/theme.css";
```
Add to vite.config.ts:
```ts
import { readFileSync } from 'fs';
import { resolve } from 'path';

// In vite config css.preprocessorOptions or just add @source in CSS:
// @source './node_modules/@3df-spa/ui/dist';
```

---

## Design Tokens

`theme.css` tiene 4 bloques de configuración:

### 1. `:root` — Tokens semánticos (light)

Variables CSS base que definen todos los colores en modo claro:

| Token | Valor | Descripción |
|---|---|---|
| `--background` | hsl(0 0% 100%) | Fondo de página |
| `--foreground` | hsl(240 10% 3.9%) | Texto principal |
| `--card` | hsl(0 0% 100%) | Fondo de cards |
| `--primary` | hsl(240 5.9% 10%) | Acciones primarias |
| `--secondary` | hsl(240 4.8% 95.9%) | Fondos secundarios |
| `--muted` | hsl(240 4.8% 95.9%) | Fondos sutiles |
| `--muted-foreground` | hsl(240 3.8% 46.1%) | Texto secundario |
| `--accent` | hsl(240 4.8% 95.9%) | Hover/highlight |
| `--destructive` | hsl(0 84.2% 60.2%) | Errores / eliminar |
| `--success` | hsl(142 76% 36%) | Éxito |
| `--warning` | hsl(38 92% 50%) | Advertencia |
| `--info` | hsl(217 91% 60%) | Información |
| `--border` | hsl(--border-hsl / --ui-border-opacity) | Bordes dinámicos con opacidad |
| `--ring` | hsl(240 10% 3.9%) | Focus ring |
| `--radius` | 1rem | Base del sistema de border-radius |
| `--ui-border-opacity` | 0.5 | Opacidad global de bordes (3df Customizer) |
| `--ui-radius` | 1rem | Radio controlado por 3df Customizer |
| `--ui-letter-spacing` | 0em | Letter spacing global (3df Customizer) |

### 2. `.dark` — Overrides modo oscuro

Añadir clase `.dark` al `<html>` para activar dark mode. Los valores de `:root` se sobreescriben:

```css
/* Activar dark mode */
document.documentElement.classList.add('dark')
```

Cambios clave en dark: `--background: hsl(240 10% 3.9%)`, `--foreground: hsl(0 0% 98%)`, `--destructive: hsl(0 72% 62%)` (ajustado para visibilidad en fondos oscuros), `--success: hsl(142 71% 60%)`, `--warning: hsl(38 95% 62%)`.

### 2b. `.theme-3df` — Tema Forest (modo oscuro verde bosque)

Tema completo alternativo al modo `dark`. Aplica clase `.theme-3df` al `<html>`. Define una paleta de verde bosque oscuro en toda la interfaz.

```css
/* Activar tema 3DF */
document.documentElement.classList.add('theme-3df')
```

Colores principales: `--background: hsl(145 20% 7%)` (negro-verdoso), `--foreground: hsl(145 8% 92%)` (crema), `--primary: hsl(145 50% 45%)` (verde bosque), `--ring: hsl(145 50% 45%)`.

El tema se activa vía `use3dfConfig()` con `theme: '3df'` o programáticamente con `applyTheme('3df')`.

### 3. `@theme inline` — Mapeo a utilidades Tailwind

Este bloque convierte todos los tokens semánticos en clases Tailwind utilizables directamente:

**Colores** → clases `bg-*`, `text-*`, `border-*`:
```
bg-background    text-foreground      border-border
bg-card          text-card-foreground
bg-popover       text-popover-foreground
bg-primary       text-primary-foreground
bg-secondary     text-secondary-foreground
bg-muted         text-muted-foreground
bg-accent        text-accent-foreground
bg-destructive   text-destructive-foreground
bg-success       text-success-foreground
bg-warning       text-warning-foreground
bg-info          text-info-foreground
bg-sidebar       text-sidebar-foreground
```

**Charts** → `text-chart-1` ... `text-chart-12`, `bg-chart-1` ... `bg-chart-12`

**Radius** → `rounded-sm`, `rounded-md`, `rounded-lg`, `rounded-xl` (escalan desde `--radius`)

**Shadows** → `shadow-2xs`, `shadow-xs`, `shadow-sm`, `shadow-md`, `shadow-lg`, `shadow-xl`, `shadow-2xl`, `shadow-inner`

**Fonts** → `font-sans`, `font-serif`, `font-mono`

**Animations** → `animate-fade-in`, `animate-fade-out`, `animate-slide-up`, `animate-slide-down`, `animate-scale-in`, `animate-scale-out`, `animate-shimmer`, `animate-pulse-soft` (ver sección 4)

### 4. `@theme` — Animaciones y durations

Clases de animación disponibles:

| Clase | Descripción |
|---|---|
| `animate-fade-in` | Fade entrada suave |
| `animate-fade-out` | Fade salida |
| `animate-slide-up` | Slide desde abajo |
| `animate-slide-down` | Slide desde arriba |
| `animate-scale-in` | Scale + fade entrada |
| `animate-scale-out` | Scale + fade salida |
| `animate-shimmer` | Skeleton shimmer loop |
| `animate-pulse-soft` | Pulse suave loop |

Duration utilities: `duration-instant` (75ms), `duration-fast` (150ms), `duration-normal` (250ms), `duration-slow` (350ms), `duration-deliberate` (500ms)

Global customization:
```css
:root {
  --ui-border-width: 1px;  /* bordes más finos */
  --ui-radius: 1rem;       /* esquinas más redondeadas */
  --ui-border-opacity: 0.8; /* bordes más visibles */
}
```

---

## Vue Plugin Setup

```ts
// main.ts
import { createApp } from 'vue'
import App from './App.vue'
import '@3df-spa/ui/styles.css' // or theme.css with Option B

createApp(App).mount('#app')
```

No plugin registration needed — all components are imported directly.

---

## @3df-spa/ui — Component Reference

All imports come from `@3df-spa/ui`. Never import from internal paths.

### Buttons

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Button variant="default">Click me</Button>
  <Button variant="destructive" size="sm">Delete</Button>
  <Button variant="outline" size="lg" :disabled="loading">
    <Loader2 class="animate-spin" /> Loading
  </Button>
</template>
```

Button props: `variant` (default|destructive|outline|secondary|ghost|link), `size` (default|sm|lg|icon), `disabled`, `as` (renders as different element).

### Input & Label

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Input, Label } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
    <Label for="email">Email</Label>
    <Input id="email" type="email" placeholder="user@example.com" />
  </div>
</template>
```

### Textarea

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Textarea } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Textarea placeholder="Write something..." rows="4" />
</template>
```

### Select

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const value = ref('')
</script>
<template>
  <Select v-model="value">
    <SelectTrigger><SelectValue placeholder="Choose..." /></SelectTrigger>
    <SelectContent>
      <SelectItem value="a">Option A</SelectItem>
      <SelectItem value="b">Option B</SelectItem>
    </SelectContent>
  </Select>
</template>
```

### Checkbox

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Checkbox, Label } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const checked = ref(false)
const indeterminate = ref(false)
</script>
<template>
  <!-- Basic usage -->
  <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
    <Checkbox id="terms" v-model="checked" />
    <Label for="terms">Accept terms</Label>
  </div>

  <!-- Indeterminate (select-all pattern) -->
  <Checkbox v-model="checked" :indeterminate="indeterminate" />

  <!-- Sizes -->
  <Checkbox size="sm" v-model="checked" />
  <Checkbox size="default" v-model="checked" />
  <Checkbox size="lg" v-model="checked" />

  <!-- Disabled -->
  <Checkbox v-model="checked" disabled />
</template>
```

Checkbox props: `modelValue` (boolean, default `false`), `indeterminate` (boolean, default `false`), `size` (`sm` | `default` | `lg`, default `'default'`). Passes any native `<input type="checkbox">` attribute (e.g. `disabled`, `id`, `name`). Unchecked state uses `bg-foreground/5` so it is always visible against any background.

### Switch

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Switch, Label } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const enabled = ref(false)
</script>
<template>
  <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
    <Switch id="notif" v-model:checked="enabled" />
    <Label for="notif">Notifications</Label>
  </div>
</template>
```

### Radio Group

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem, Label } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const plan = ref('free')
</script>
<template>
  <RadioGroup v-model="plan">
    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
      <RadioGroupItem id="free" value="free" />
      <Label for="free">Free</Label>
    </div>
    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
      <RadioGroupItem id="pro" value="pro" />
      <Label for="pro">Pro</Label>
    </div>
  </RadioGroup>
</template>
```

### Combobox

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Combobox } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const value = ref('')
const options = [
  { value: 'react', label: 'React' },
  { value: 'vue', label: 'Vue' },
  { value: 'angular', label: 'Angular', disabled: true },
]
</script>
<template>
  <Combobox
    v-model="value"
    :options="options"
    placeholder="Select framework..."
    search-placeholder="Search..."
    empty-message="No results found."
  />
</template>
```

Combobox props: `modelValue` (string), `options` (array of `{ value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }`), `placeholder` (string, default `'Select option...'`), `searchPlaceholder` (string, default `'Search...'`), `emptyMessage` (string, default `'No results found.'`). Self-contained component — no extra wrappers needed. Opens on single click, dismisses on outside click or Escape.

### DatePicker

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { DatePicker } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const date = ref<Date>()
</script>
<template>
  <DatePicker v-model="date" placeholder="Pick a date" />
</template>
```

### Slider

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Slider } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const volume = ref([50])
</script>
<template>
  <Slider v-model="volume" :min="0" :max="100" :step="1" />
</template>
```

### Toggle

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Toggle } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Toggle>Bold</Toggle>
  <Toggle variant="outline" size="sm">Italic</Toggle>
</template>
```

Toggle props: `variant` (default|outline), `size` (default|sm|lg), `pressed`.

### InputOTP

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { InputOTP, InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSlot } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const otp = ref('')
</script>
<template>
  <InputOTP v-model="otp" :maxlength="6">
    <InputOTPGroup>
      <InputOTPSlot :index="0" />
      <InputOTPSlot :index="1" />
      <InputOTPSlot :index="2" />
      <InputOTPSlot :index="3" />
      <InputOTPSlot :index="4" />
      <InputOTPSlot :index="5" />
    </InputOTPGroup>
  </InputOTP>
</template>
```

### Card

> **UiCard notes:** El root incluye `overflow-hidden min-w-0 w-full` para que `border-radius` clipee correctamente el contenido. Header, Content y Footer usan padding responsive `p-3 sm:p-6`. Title y Description incluyen `break-words` para evitar overflow de texto.

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Card>
    <CardHeader>
      <CardTitle>Title</CardTitle>
      <CardDescription>Description</CardDescription>
    </CardHeader>
    <CardContent>Content here</CardContent>
    <CardFooter>
      <Button>Action</Button>
    </CardFooter>
  </Card>
</template>
```

### Badge

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Badge } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Badge>Default</Badge>
  <Badge variant="secondary">Secondary</Badge>
  <Badge variant="destructive">Error</Badge>
  <Badge variant="outline">Outline</Badge>
</template>
```

Badge props: `variant` (default|secondary|destructive|outline).

### Avatar

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Avatar>
    <AvatarImage src="/avatar.png" alt="User" />
    <AvatarFallback>JD</AvatarFallback>
  </Avatar>
</template>
```

### Alert

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Alert>
    <AlertTitle>Heads up!</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>Something important happened.</AlertDescription>
  </Alert>
  <Alert variant="destructive">
    <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>Something went wrong.</AlertDescription>
  </Alert>
</template>
```

### Banner

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Banner } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Banner variant="info">Your session expires soon.</Banner>
  <Banner variant="warning" dismissible>Maintenance scheduled.</Banner>
</template>
```

### Progress

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Progress } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const value = ref(60)
</script>
<template>
  <Progress :value="value" />
</template>
```

### Skeleton

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Skeleton } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Skeleton class="h-4 w-[200px]" />
  <Skeleton class="h-12 w-12 rounded-full" />
</template>
```

### Separator

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Separator } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Separator />
  <Separator orientation="vertical" class="h-4" />
</template>
```

### ScrollArea

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { ScrollArea } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <ScrollArea class="h-72 w-48">
    <div v-for="i in 50" :key="i">Item {{ i }}</div>
  </ScrollArea>
</template>
```

### Tabs

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Tabs default-value="account">
    <TabsList>
      <TabsTrigger value="account">Account</TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="password">Password</TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
    <TabsContent value="account">Account settings...</TabsContent>
    <TabsContent value="password">Password settings...</TabsContent>
  </Tabs>
</template>
```

### Accordion

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Accordion type="single" collapsible>
    <AccordionItem value="item-1">
      <AccordionTrigger>Is it accessible?</AccordionTrigger>
      <AccordionContent>Yes. It follows WAI-ARIA patterns.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
  </Accordion>
</template>
```

### Collapsible

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, CollapsibleContent } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const open = ref(false)
</script>
<template>
  <Collapsible v-model:open="open">
    <CollapsibleTrigger>Toggle</CollapsibleTrigger>
    <CollapsibleContent>Hidden content here.</CollapsibleContent>
  </Collapsible>
</template>
```

### Dialog

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogClose } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Dialog>
    <DialogTrigger as-child><Button>Open</Button></DialogTrigger>
    <DialogContent>
      <DialogHeader>
        <DialogTitle>Edit profile</DialogTitle>
        <DialogDescription>Make changes here.</DialogDescription>
      </DialogHeader>
      <div>Form content</div>
      <DialogFooter>
        <DialogClose as-child><Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button></DialogClose>
        <Button>Save</Button>
      </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
  </Dialog>
</template>
```

### AlertDialog

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { AlertDialog, AlertDialogTrigger, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogCancel, AlertDialogAction } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <AlertDialog>
    <AlertDialogTrigger as-child><Button variant="destructive">Delete</Button></AlertDialogTrigger>
    <AlertDialogContent>
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Are you sure?</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>This cannot be undone.</AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction>Delete</AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
</template>
```

### Sheet

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Sheet, SheetTrigger, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetDescription, SheetFooter, SheetClose } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Sheet>
    <SheetTrigger as-child><Button>Open Sheet</Button></SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent side="right">
      <SheetHeader>
        <SheetTitle>Edit profile</SheetTitle>
        <SheetDescription>Make changes here.</SheetDescription>
      </SheetHeader>
      <div>Content</div>
      <SheetFooter>
        <SheetClose as-child><Button>Save</Button></SheetClose>
      </SheetFooter>
    </SheetContent>
  </Sheet>
</template>
```

Sheet `side` prop: `right` (default) | `left` | `top` | `bottom`.

### Drawer

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Drawer, DrawerTrigger, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, DrawerTitle, DrawerDescription, DrawerFooter, DrawerClose } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Drawer>
    <DrawerTrigger as-child><Button>Open Drawer</Button></DrawerTrigger>
    <DrawerContent>
      <DrawerHeader>
        <DrawerTitle>Title</DrawerTitle>
        <DrawerDescription>Description</DrawerDescription>
      </DrawerHeader>
      <div class="p-4">Content</div>
      <DrawerFooter>
        <DrawerClose as-child><Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button></DrawerClose>
      </DrawerFooter>
    </DrawerContent>
  </Drawer>
</template>
```

### DropdownMenu

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuLabel } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownMenuTrigger as-child><Button variant="outline">Options</Button></DropdownMenuTrigger>
    <DropdownMenuContent>
      <DropdownMenuLabel>My Account</DropdownMenuLabel>
      <DropdownMenuSeparator />
      <DropdownMenuItem>Profile</DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItem>Settings</DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuSeparator />
      <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive">Logout</DropdownMenuItem>
    </DropdownMenuContent>
  </DropdownMenu>
</template>
```

### ContextMenu

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { ContextMenu, ContextMenuTrigger, ContextMenuContent, ContextMenuItem } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <ContextMenu>
    <ContextMenuTrigger>Right-click here</ContextMenuTrigger>
    <ContextMenuContent>
      <ContextMenuItem>View</ContextMenuItem>
      <ContextMenuItem>Edit</ContextMenuItem>
    </ContextMenuContent>
  </ContextMenu>
</template>
```

### Command

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Command, CommandInput, CommandList, CommandEmpty, CommandGroup, CommandItem, CommandDialog } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const selected = ref('')
</script>
<template>
  <!-- Inline -->
  <Command @select="(val) => console.log(val)" @update:selected="selected = $event">
    <CommandInput placeholder="Buscar..." />
    <CommandList>
      <CommandEmpty>Sin resultados.</CommandEmpty>
      <CommandGroup heading="Sugerencias">
        <CommandItem value="calendar">Calendario</CommandItem>
        <CommandItem value="settings">Ajustes</CommandItem>
      </CommandGroup>
    </CommandList>
  </Command>

  <!-- Dialog (Ctrl+K / ⌘K) -->
  <CommandDialog v-model:open="open" :show-close="true" @select="onSelect" @update:selected="onHighlight">
    <!-- mismo contenido -->
  </CommandDialog>
</template>
```

Command emits: `select` (valor confirmado con Enter/click), `update:selected` (valor en hover/flechas — útil para previews en tiempo real)
CommandDialog props: `open`, `defaultOpen`, `showClose` (muestra botón X)
CommandList: NO tiene max-height por defecto — el consumer controla la altura con clase exterior (`class="max-h-[300px]"`)
Navegación teclado: ↑↓ navegan, Enter selecciona, Home/End van al inicio/fin. Auto-scroll al item activo.
Auto-selección: el primer ítem visible se selecciona automáticamente al abrir el Command.

### CommandPalette

Componente de alto nivel construido sobre los primitivos `Command`. Layout de panel dividido: lista agrupada con búsqueda a la izquierda + panel de vista previa personalizable a la derecha.

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { CommandPalette } from '@3df-spa/ui'
import type { CommandPaletteItem, CommandPaletteGroup } from '@3df-spa/ui'

const open = ref(false)

const groups: CommandPaletteGroup[] = [
  {
    label: 'General',
    icon: 'M21 16V8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4...', // SVG path data
    items: [
      { value: 'button', label: 'Button' },
      { value: 'badge',  label: 'Badge',  keywords: ['tag', 'chip'] },
    ],
  },
  {
    label: 'Layout',
    items: [
      { value: 'card',      label: 'Card'      },
      { value: 'accordion', label: 'Accordion' },
    ],
  },
]

function onSelect(item: CommandPaletteItem) {
  router.push(`/docs/${item.value}`)
}
</script>

<template>
  <button @click="open = true">Search ⌘K</button>

  <CommandPalette
    v-model:open="open"
    :groups="groups"
    search-placeholder="Search components..."
    @update:selected="loadPreview"
    @select="onSelect"
  >
    <!-- #preview slot: full control of the right panel -->
    <template #preview="{ item, close }">
      <div v-if="item" class="flex flex-col h-full">
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-border/60 shrink-0">
          <span class="font-semibold">{{ item.label }}</span>
          <button @click="close">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="flex-1 overflow-auto p-6">
          <!-- render whatever preview content you need -->
          <component :is="previewComponent" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- empty state when nothing is selected -->
      <div v-else class="flex h-full items-center justify-center text-muted-foreground text-sm">
        Select an item to preview
      </div>
    </template>
  </CommandPalette>
</template>
```

Props: `open` (v-model), `groups: CommandPaletteGroup[]`, `searchPlaceholder` (default: `'Search...'`)
Emits: `update:open`, `select(item: CommandPaletteItem)`, `update:selected(item: CommandPaletteItem | null)`

**CommandPaletteGroup:** `{ label: string, icon?: string, items: CommandPaletteItem[] }`
**CommandPaletteItem:** `{ value: string, label: string, icon?: string, keywords?: string[], [key: string]: unknown }`
- `value` — identificador único, pasado en `@select`
- `label` — texto visible y buscable
- `icon` — SVG path para sobreescribir el icono del grupo en ese ítem
- `keywords` — términos extra de búsqueda (además de `label` y `group.label`)
- Campos extra libres: el consumer puede añadir cualquier dato que necesite (e.g., `description`, `href`, `group`)

**Slots:**
- `#preview` → `{ item: CommandPaletteItem | null, close: () => void }` — panel derecho completo
- `#item` → `{ item, group, isSelected }` — render custom de cada ítem en la lista
- `#empty` — contenido cuando ningún ítem coincide con la búsqueda

**Comportamiento:**
- El primer ítem se auto-selecciona al abrir (activa la vista previa inmediatamente)
- Filtrado interno: busca en `item.value + item.label + group.label + item.keywords`
- Los grupos sin resultados se ocultan automáticamente al filtrar (no aparecen headers vacíos)
- `⌘K` / `Ctrl+K` abre/cierra (heredado de CommandDialog)
- Al seleccionar (`Enter` o click) se emite `@select` y se cierra automáticamente
- Footer con hints de teclado: `↑↓` navegar · `↵` seleccionar · `esc` cerrar

### HoverCard

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { HoverCard, HoverCardTrigger, HoverCardContent } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <HoverCard>
    <HoverCardTrigger>Hover me</HoverCardTrigger>
    <HoverCardContent>Preview content here.</HoverCardContent>
  </HoverCard>
</template>
```

### Tooltip

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <TooltipProvider>
    <Tooltip>
      <TooltipTrigger as-child><Button>Hover me</Button></TooltipTrigger>
      <TooltipContent>Helpful text</TooltipContent>
    </Tooltip>
  </TooltipProvider>
</template>
```

### Toast (Sonner)

Toast es una implementación **custom** de `@3df-spa/ui`. NO usar `vue-sonner`.

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Toaster, toast } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <!-- Añadir una vez en App.vue -->
  <Toaster position="bottom-right" :max-visible="5" />

  <!-- Disparar desde cualquier componente -->
  <Button @click="toast({ title: 'Guardado', variant: 'success' })">Éxito</Button>
  <Button @click="toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Algo salió mal', variant: 'error' })">Error</Button>
  <Button @click="toast({ title: 'Atención', variant: 'warning' })">Warning</Button>
  <Button @click="toast({ title: 'Info', variant: 'info', duration: 0 })">Info persistente</Button>
</template>
```

toast() opciones: `{ title?, description?, variant ('default'|'success'|'error'|'warning'|'info'), duration (ms, 0=persistente), dismissible, action: { label, onClick } }`
Toaster props: `position` (top/bottom-left/center/right), `maxVisible` (default: 5)

### Breadcrumb

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Breadcrumb>
    <BreadcrumbList>
      <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/">Home</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
      <BreadcrumbSeparator />
      <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/components">Components</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
      <BreadcrumbSeparator />
      <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbPage>Breadcrumb</BreadcrumbPage></BreadcrumbItem>
    </BreadcrumbList>
  </Breadcrumb>
</template>
```

### NavigationMenu

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { NavigationMenu, NavigationMenuList, NavigationMenuItem, NavigationMenuTrigger, NavigationMenuContent, NavigationMenuLink } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <NavigationMenu>
    <NavigationMenuList>
      <NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuTrigger>Products</NavigationMenuTrigger>
        <NavigationMenuContent>
          <NavigationMenuLink href="/ui">UI Library</NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuContent>
      </NavigationMenuItem>
    </NavigationMenuList>
  </NavigationMenu>
</template>
```

### Menubar

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Menubar, MenubarMenu, MenubarTrigger, MenubarContent, MenubarItem, MenubarSeparator } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Menubar>
    <MenubarMenu>
      <MenubarTrigger>File</MenubarTrigger>
      <MenubarContent>
        <MenubarItem>New</MenubarItem>
        <MenubarItem>Open</MenubarItem>
        <MenubarSeparator />
        <MenubarItem>Exit</MenubarItem>
      </MenubarContent>
    </MenubarMenu>
  </Menubar>
</template>
```

### Pagination

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Pagination, PaginationList, PaginationListItem, PaginationPrev, PaginationNext, PaginationFirst, PaginationLast, PaginationEllipsis } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const page = ref(1)
</script>
<template>
  <Pagination v-model:page="page" :total="100" :sibling-count="1" show-edges>
    <PaginationList v-slot="{ items }">
      <PaginationFirst />
      <PaginationPrev />
      <template v-for="item in items" :key="item.type">
        <PaginationListItem v-if="item.type === 'page'" :value="item.value">
          {{ item.value }}
        </PaginationListItem>
        <PaginationEllipsis v-else />
      </template>
      <PaginationNext />
      <PaginationLast />
    </PaginationList>
  </Pagination>
</template>
```

### Table

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Table>
    <TableCaption>List of users</TableCaption>
    <TableHeader>
      <TableRow>
        <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
        <TableHead>Email</TableHead>
        <TableHead>Role</TableHead>
      </TableRow>
    </TableHeader>
    <TableBody>
      <TableRow>
        <TableCell>John Doe</TableCell>
        <TableCell>john@example.com</TableCell>
        <TableCell>Admin</TableCell>
      </TableRow>
    </TableBody>
  </Table>
</template>
```

**Componentes y props:**
- `Table`: `variant` ('default'|'bordered'|'ghost'), `size` ('sm'|'default'|'lg'), `rounded` (boolean), `stickyHeader` (boolean)
- `TableRow`: `variant` ('default'|'selected'|'striped')
- `TableHead`: `sortable` (boolean), `sortDirection` ('asc'|'desc'|null), `align` ('left'|'center'|'right')
- `TableCell`: `align` ('left'|'center'|'right'), `numeric` (boolean)
- `TableEmpty`: `label` (string, **requerida** — sin default)

---

### DataTable

Tabla funcional avanzada para datos interactivos.

**Componentes:**
- `DataTable` — wrapper card con `border-ui border-border bg-card`. Props: `variant` ('default'|'bordered'|'striped'|'ghost'), `size` ('sm'|'default'|'lg'), `rounded` (boolean), `stickyHeader` (boolean), `loading` (boolean), `skeletonRows` (number, default 5). Provee contexto `{ size, variant }` a hijos via provide/inject.
- `DataTableHead` — cabecera con sorting animado (íconos SVG inline). Props: `sortable` (boolean), `sortDirection` ('asc'|'desc'|null), `align` ('left'|'center'|'right'). Emite `click` para sorting. Sticky cuando `stickyHeader` en contexto.
- `DataTableRow` — fila seleccionable. Props: `selected` (boolean → `bg-primary/10`), `variant`. Slot `#actions`.
- `DataTableCell` — celda. Props: `align`, `numeric` (boolean), `mono` (boolean), `truncate` (boolean, max-w 200px).
- `DataTableSkeleton` — skeleton de carga. Props: `rows` (number), `columns` (number, default 4). Usa `animate-pulse bg-muted`.

**Uso básico:**
```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable, DataTableHead, DataTableRow, DataTableCell } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <DataTable variant="bordered" size="default" :loading="isLoading" :skeleton-rows="5">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <DataTableHead sortable :sort-direction="sort.name" @click="toggleSort('name')">Name</DataTableHead>
        <DataTableHead align="right">Amount</DataTableHead>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <DataTableRow v-for="row in rows" :key="row.id" :selected="selected.includes(row.id)">
        <DataTableCell>{{ row.name }}</DataTableCell>
        <DataTableCell align="right" numeric>{{ row.amount }}</DataTableCell>
      </DataTableRow>
    </tbody>
  </DataTable>
</template>
```

---

### PanelTable

Tabla visual para dashboards y KPIs con acentos de color.

**Componentes:**
- `PanelTable` — siempre envuelto en card (`bg-card border-ui border-border`). Props: `accent` ('default'|'primary'|'success'|'warning'|'destructive'|'info'), `size` ('sm'|'default'|'lg'), `divided` (boolean — `divide-y divide-border` en tbody), `rounded` (boolean, default true). Provee contexto `{ accent, size, divided }`.
- `PanelTableHead` — cabecera con fondo de acento, `text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold`. Inject accent del contexto.
- `PanelTableRow` — fila con hover elevado (`hover:translate-x-0.5 hover:shadow-sm`) y barra lateral de acento (`border-l-ui`).
- `PanelTableCell` — celda con slots `#default`, `#badge`, `#avatar`. Inject size del contexto.

**Uso básico:**
```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { PanelTable, PanelTableHead, PanelTableRow, PanelTableCell } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <PanelTable accent="primary" divided>
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <PanelTableHead>User</PanelTableHead>
        <PanelTableHead>Status</PanelTableHead>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <PanelTableRow v-for="user in users" :key="user.id">
        <PanelTableCell>{{ user.name }}</PanelTableCell>
        <PanelTableCell>
          <template #badge><Badge>{{ user.status }}</Badge></template>
        </PanelTableCell>
      </PanelTableRow>
    </tbody>
  </PanelTable>
</template>
```

### Sidebar

Sub-componentes disponibles:
- `SidebarProvider` — Proveedor de contexto. Envuelve todo el layout. Props: `side` (left|right), `variant` (sidebar|floating|inset).
- `Sidebar` — El panel lateral. Props: `side` (left|right), `variant` (sidebar|floating|inset). **Sin collapsible** — es un flex child estático (`shrink-0 h-svh`). El consumer gestiona el comportamiento mobile.
- `SidebarHeader` — Cabecera del sidebar.
- `SidebarFooter` — Pie del sidebar.
- `SidebarContent` — Área de contenido con scroll.
- `SidebarGroup` / `SidebarGroupLabel` / `SidebarGroupContent` — Agrupación de items.
- `SidebarMenu` / `SidebarMenuItem` / `SidebarMenuButton` — Menú de navegación.
- `SidebarMenuSub` / `SidebarMenuSubItem` / `SidebarMenuSubButton` — Sub-menús anidados.
- `SidebarMenuBadge` — Badge numérico en items de menú.
- `SidebarMenuAction` — Acción secundaria en item de menú.
- `SidebarMenuSkeleton` — Skeleton de carga para items de menú.
- `SidebarSeparator` — Separador visual.
- `SidebarRail` — Rail estrecho. Emite evento `toggle` que el consumer puede usar.
- `SidebarInset` — Área de contenido principal para layout tipo inset.
- `SidebarTrigger` — Botón que emite evento `toggle`. El consumer decide la lógica de colapso.

> **Color:** `--sidebar` referencia `var(--background)` por defecto — el sidebar coincide con el fondo del tema automáticamente.
> **Layout:** el `Sidebar` es un flex child en-flujo (no `position: fixed`). El `SidebarInset` toma el espacio restante con `flex-1`. Para sidebar derecho, el `<Sidebar>` debe colocarse después del `<SidebarInset>` en el template.
> **Mobile:** el componente NO gestiona mobile internamente. Para ocultar en móvil usa `class="hidden lg:flex"` en `<Sidebar>` y añade tu propio Sheet/drawer con la navegación.
> **Border:** usa `border-r-ui`/`border-l-ui` (responde a `--ui-border-width`).

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarHeader, SidebarFooter, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarInset } from '@3df/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <SidebarProvider>
    <Sidebar>
      <SidebarHeader>My App</SidebarHeader>
      <SidebarContent>
        <SidebarMenu>
          <SidebarMenuItem>
            <SidebarMenuButton>Dashboard</SidebarMenuButton>
          </SidebarMenuItem>
          <SidebarMenuItem>
            <SidebarMenuButton>Settings</SidebarMenuButton>
          </SidebarMenuItem>
        </SidebarMenu>
      </SidebarContent>
      <SidebarFooter>Footer</SidebarFooter>
    </Sidebar>
    <SidebarInset>
      <!-- page content -->
    </SidebarInset>
  </SidebarProvider>
</template>
```

### EmptyState

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { EmptyState } from '@3df-spa/ui'
import { Search } from 'lucide-vue-next'
</script>
<template>
  <EmptyState
    title="No results found"
    description="Try adjusting your search filters."
    :icon="Search"
  >
    <Button>Clear filters</Button>
  </EmptyState>
</template>
```

### Hero

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Hero, HeroTitle, HeroDescription, HeroActions } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Hero>
    <HeroTitle>Build faster with 3DF UI</HeroTitle>
    <HeroDescription>A complete Vue 3 component library.</HeroDescription>
    <HeroActions>
      <Button size="lg">Get started</Button>
      <Button variant="outline" size="lg">View docs</Button>
    </HeroActions>
  </Hero>
</template>
```

### Carousel

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselPrevious, CarouselNext } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Carousel>
    <CarouselContent>
      <CarouselItem v-for="i in 5" :key="i">Slide {{ i }}</CarouselItem>
    </CarouselContent>
    <CarouselPrevious />
    <CarouselNext />
  </Carousel>
</template>
```

### Calendar

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Calendar } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const selected = ref<Date>()
</script>
<template>
  <Calendar v-model="selected" />
</template>
```

### Kbd

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Kbd } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Kbd>⌘K</Kbd>
  <span>Press <Kbd>Ctrl</Kbd> + <Kbd>S</Kbd> to save</span>
</template>
```

---

## @3df-spa/charts — Component Reference

All imports from `@3df-spa/charts`. Zero external dependencies (Vue peer only).

### Core Concepts

Every chart uses `UiChartContainer` as the wrapper (provides responsive width/height via ResizeObserver). The `config` prop maps series keys to labels and colors. Data is an array of row objects.

```ts
import type { ChartConfig } from '@3df-spa/charts'

const config: ChartConfig = {
  sales: { label: 'Sales', color: 'hsl(215 20% 42%)' },
  revenue: { label: 'Revenue', color: 'hsl(170 25% 38%)' },
}
```

### Bar Chart

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { UiChartBar } from '@3df-spa/charts'
import type { ChartConfig } from '@3df-spa/charts'

const data = [
  { month: 'Jan', sales: 120, returns: 20 },
  { month: 'Feb', sales: 200, returns: 35 },
  { month: 'Mar', sales: 180, returns: 28 },
]

const config: ChartConfig = {
  sales: { label: 'Sales', color: 'hsl(215 20% 42%)' },
  returns: { label: 'Returns', color: 'hsl(340 18% 48%)' },
}
</script>
<template>
  <UiChartBar
    :data="data"
    :config="config"
    index="month"
    :categories="['sales', 'returns']"
    class="h-64"
  />
</template>
```

UiChartBar props:
- `data` — array of row objects (required)
- `config` — ChartConfig mapping series keys to label/color (required)
- `index` — key in data used for X axis labels (required)
- `categories` — array of keys to plot as bars (required)
- `stack` — boolean, stacks bars (default: false)
- `orientation` — `'horizontal'` | `'vertical'` (default: `'vertical'`)
- `showLegend` — boolean (default: true)
- `showTooltip` — boolean (default: true)
- `showGrid` — boolean (default: true)
- `showXAxis` — boolean (default: true)
- `showYAxis` — boolean (default: true)

### Line Chart

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { UiChartLine } from '@3df-spa/charts'
import type { ChartConfig } from '@3df-spa/charts'

const data = [
  { month: 'Jan', visitors: 400, pageviews: 1200 },
  { month: 'Feb', visitors: 600, pageviews: 1800 },
  { month: 'Mar', visitors: 550, pageviews: 1600 },
]

const config: ChartConfig = {
  visitors: { label: 'Visitors', color: 'hsl(215 20% 42%)' },
  pageviews: { label: 'Page Views', color: 'hsl(170 25% 38%)' },
}
</script>
<template>
  <UiChartLine
    :data="data"
    :config="config"
    index="month"
    :categories="['visitors', 'pageviews']"
    class="h-64"
  />
</template>
```

UiChartLine props: same as UiChartBar plus:
- `curve` — `'linear'` | `'smooth'` | `'step'` (default: `'smooth'`)
- `dots` — boolean, show data points (default: true)

### Pie Chart

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { UiChartPie } from '@3df-spa/charts'
import type { ChartConfig } from '@3df-spa/charts'

const data = [
  { name: 'Chrome', value: 62 },
  { name: 'Safari', value: 18 },
  { name: 'Firefox', value: 12 },
  { name: 'Other', value: 8 },
]

const config: ChartConfig = {
  Chrome: { label: 'Chrome', color: 'hsl(215 20% 42%)' },
  Safari: { label: 'Safari', color: 'hsl(170 25% 38%)' },
  Firefox: { label: 'Firefox', color: 'hsl(340 18% 48%)' },
  Other: { label: 'Other', color: 'hsl(38 92% 50%)' },
}
</script>
<template>
  <UiChartPie
    :data="data"
    :config="config"
    index="name"
    category="value"
    class="h-64"
  />
</template>
```

UiChartPie props:
- `data`, `config`, `index` — same as above
- `category` — key in data for numeric values (required)
- `donut` — boolean, renders as donut (default: false)
- `showLegend`, `showTooltip` — boolean

### Radar Chart

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { UiChartRadar } from '@3df-spa/charts'
import type { ChartConfig } from '@3df-spa/charts'

const data = [
  { skill: 'HTML', alice: 90, bob: 70 },
  { skill: 'CSS', alice: 85, bob: 60 },
  { skill: 'JS', alice: 78, bob: 88 },
  { skill: 'Vue', alice: 92, bob: 55 },
  { skill: 'Node', alice: 65, bob: 80 },
]

const config: ChartConfig = {
  alice: { label: 'Alice', color: 'hsl(215 20% 42%)' },
  bob: { label: 'Bob', color: 'hsl(340 18% 48%)' },
}
</script>
<template>
  <UiChartRadar
    :data="data"
    :config="config"
    index="skill"
    :categories="['alice', 'bob']"
    class="h-64"
  />
</template>
```

### Scatter Chart

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { UiChartScatter } from '@3df-spa/charts'
import type { ChartConfig, ScatterConfig } from '@3df-spa/charts'

const data = [
  { x: 10, y: 30, group: 'A' },
  { x: 25, y: 15, group: 'A' },
  { x: 40, y: 50, group: 'B' },
]

const config: ChartConfig = {
  A: { label: 'Group A', color: 'hsl(215 20% 42%)' },
  B: { label: 'Group B', color: 'hsl(340 18% 48%)' },
}
</script>
<template>
  <UiChartScatter
    :data="data"
    :config="config"
    x-key="x"
    y-key="y"
    group-key="group"
    class="h-64"
  />
</template>
```

### Gauge Chart

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { UiChartGauge } from '@3df-spa/charts'
</script>
<template>
  <!-- Simple gauge -->
  <UiChartGauge :value="72" :max="100" label="Performance" class="h-48" />

  <!-- Segmented gauge -->
  <UiChartGauge
    :value="65"
    :segments="[
      { min: 0, max: 33, color: 'hsl(0 84% 50%)' },
      { min: 33, max: 66, color: 'hsl(38 92% 50%)' },
      { min: 66, max: 100, color: 'hsl(152 69% 31%)' },
    ]"
    label="Health"
    class="h-48"
  />
</template>
```

UiChartGauge props:
- `value` — current value (required)
- `min` — minimum value (default: 0)
- `max` — maximum value (default: 100)
- `label` — text label below gauge
- `variant` — `'default'` | `'segmented'`
- `segments` — array of `{ min, max, color }` for segmented variant
- `showValue` — boolean (default: true)
- `animated` — boolean (default: true)

---

## TypeScript Types (@3df-spa/charts)

```ts
import type {
  ChartConfig,        // Record<string, { label: string; color: string }>
  ChartSeriesConfig,  // Single series config entry
  ChartDataRow,       // Record<string, string | number>
  ChartContext,       // Provided by UiChartContainer
  GaugeSegment,       // { min: number; max: number; color: string }
  GaugeVariant,       // 'default' | 'segmented'
  RadarVariant,       // radar chart variant type
  ScatterShape,       // 'circle' | 'square' | 'triangle' | 'diamond'
  CurveType,          // 'linear' | 'smooth' | 'step'
} from '@3df-spa/charts'
```

---

## Common Patterns

### Form with validation
```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Input, Label, Button } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const email = ref('')
const error = ref('')

function submit() {
  if (!email.value.includes('@')) {
    error.value = 'Invalid email'
    return
  }
  // submit...
}
</script>
<template>
  <form @submit.prevent="submit" class="flex flex-col gap-4">
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
      <Label for="email">Email</Label>
      <Input id="email" v-model="email" type="email" :class="error ? 'border-destructive' : ''" />
      <p v-if="error" class="text-sm text-destructive">{{ error }}</p>
    </div>
    <Button type="submit">Submit</Button>
  </form>
</template>
```

### Dashboard layout with sidebar
```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarInset } from '@3df/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <SidebarProvider>
    <!-- On mobile/tablet: hide with class="hidden lg:flex" and add your own hamburger + Sheet -->
    <Sidebar>
      <SidebarContent>
        <SidebarMenu>
          <SidebarMenuItem>
            <SidebarMenuButton>Dashboard</SidebarMenuButton>
          </SidebarMenuItem>
        </SidebarMenu>
      </SidebarContent>
    </Sidebar>
    <SidebarInset>
      <slot />
    </SidebarInset>
  </SidebarProvider>
</template>
```

### Data table with pagination
```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, Pagination, PaginationList, PaginationListItem, PaginationPrev, PaginationNext } from '@3df-spa/ui'
const page = ref(1)
const perPage = 10
const data = ref([/* ... */])
const paginatedData = computed(() => data.value.slice((page.value - 1) * perPage, page.value * perPage))
</script>
<template>
  <Table>
    <TableHeader>
      <TableRow>
        <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
        <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
      </TableRow>
    </TableHeader>
    <TableBody>
      <TableRow v-for="row in paginatedData" :key="row.id">
        <TableCell>{{ row.name }}</TableCell>
        <TableCell><Badge>{{ row.status }}</Badge></TableCell>
      </TableRow>
    </TableBody>
  </Table>
  <Pagination v-model:page="page" :total="data.length">
    <PaginationList v-slot="{ items }">
      <PaginationPrev />
      <template v-for="item in items" :key="item.type">
        <PaginationListItem v-if="item.type === 'page'" :value="item.value">{{ item.value }}</PaginationListItem>
      </template>
      <PaginationNext />
    </PaginationList>
  </Pagination>
</template>
```

---

## 3df Customizer — Personalización Global

El componente `Ui3df` es un panel de personalización visual que permite al consumidor ajustar la apariencia de toda la librería en tiempo real. Usa el composable `use3dfConfig` que persiste en `localStorage`.

### Setup básico (sin persistencia)

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Ui3df } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Ui3df />
</template>
```

### Setup con persistencia en localStorage (recomendado)

```vue
<!-- App.vue -->
<script setup lang="ts">
import { use3dfConfig } from '@3df-spa/ui'
// Inicializar UNA sola vez en la raíz — carga config desde localStorage y aplica CSS vars
use3dfConfig()
</script>
```

```vue
<!-- Donde quieras mostrar el panel -->
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Ui3df } from '@3df-spa/ui'
</script>
<template>
  <Ui3df />
</template>
```

### Composable use3dfConfig()

```ts
import { use3dfConfig } from '@3df-spa/ui'

const { config, updateConfig, resetConfig } = use3dfConfig()

// config es un Ref reactivo:
// {
//   version: 4,
//   radiusStep: 4,      // 0-7 (índice en RADIUS_STEPS)
//   borderOpacity: 0.5, // 0-1
//   letterSpacing: 0,   // em offset
//   colorPreset: 'default', // id del preset de color
//   fontId: 'inter',    // id del font option
//   theme: 'system',    // 'light' | 'dark' | 'system' | '3df'
// }

// Actualizar un valor
updateConfig({ radiusStep: 6 })

// Resetear a valores por defecto
resetConfig()
```

### Variables CSS aplicadas

| Config key | CSS var aplicada | Efecto |
|---|---|---|
| `radiusStep` | `--ui-radius` | Border radius de todos los componentes |
| `borderOpacity` | `--ui-border-opacity` | Opacidad de todos los bordes |
| `letterSpacing` | `--ui-letter-spacing` | Espaciado de letras global |
| fontId | --font-sans | Tipografía global (Inter / Plus Jakarta Sans / DM Sans / Outfit) |

### Controles del panel

| **Control** | **Descripción** | **Implementación** |
|---|---|---|
| **Radius** | Nivel de redondez de bordes (0–8) | `--ui-radius` CSS var |
| **Border Opacity** | Opacidad de todos los bordes (0–1) | `--ui-border-opacity` CSS var |
| **Letter Spacing** | Espaciado de letras global (−2 a 4) | `--ui-letter-spacing` CSS var |
| **Font** | Tipografía global (Inter / Plus Jakarta Sans / DM Sans / Outfit) | `--font-sans` CSS var |
| **Color Preset** | Paleta de color activa (9 presets) | Variables HSL en `:root` |
| **Theme** | Modo de color: Light / Dark / System / **3DF** | `document.documentElement.classList` (dark / theme-3df) |

> El selector **System** escucha `prefers-color-scheme` vía `MediaQueryList` y cambia automáticamente cuando el sistema operativo alterna entre claro y oscuro. El selector **3DF** aplica el tema forest verde oscuro (clase `.theme-3df` en `<html>`). La preferencia se persiste en `localStorage` con el resto de la configuración. `applyTheme(theme)` es una función exportada del paquete para uso programático.

**Tipo `Theme`:** `'light' | 'dark' | 'system' | '3df'`

### Subcomponentes exportados

```ts
import { Ui3df, Ui3dfRadius, Ui3dfBorderOpacity, Ui3dfLetterSpacing, Ui3dfFont, Ui3dfTheme, FONT_OPTIONS, use3dfConfig } from '@3df-spa/ui'
```

`Ui3dfTheme` está disponible como componente independiente para insertar únicamente el selector de tema sin el panel completo:

```vue
import { Ui3dfTheme } from '@3df-spa/ui'
```

El selector de tema muestra 4 opciones: Light (☀️), Dark (🌙), System (🖥️), 3DF (🌿 forest verde oscuro).

### Color Presets disponibles (9)

| id | Label |
|---|---|
| `default` | Default |
| `blue` | Blue |
| `violet` | Violet |
| `rose` | Rose |
| `orange` | Orange |
| `emerald` | Emerald |
| `cyan` | Cyan |
| `amber` | Amber |
| `fuchsia` | Fuchsia |

### Ui3dfFont
Selector de tipografía con 4 fuentes (Inter, Plus Jakarta Sans, DM Sans, Outfit).
- `fontId: string` en `Ui3dfConfig` (default: `'inter'`)
- Persiste en localStorage bajo key `3df:config`
- Aplica `--font-sans` en `document.documentElement.style`
- Requiere Google Fonts link en `index.html` para cargar las fuentes
- `FONT_OPTIONS: FontOption[]` exportado desde `@3df-spa/ui`

### Reglas

- Llamar `use3dfConfig()` **una sola vez** en `App.vue` para restaurar config al recargar
- El singleton Module-level garantiza que todos los componentes compartan la misma instancia
- SSR-safe: usa `typeof window !== 'undefined'` guard
- Config versionada (`version: 1`) — preparada para futuras migraciones

---

## Changelog

### v1.5.1
- **Combobox single-click fix:** dropdown now opens reliably on the first click. Root cause was a race condition in `useFloatingLifecycle` — `UiCommand`'s auto-`scrollIntoView` on first render fired a scroll event that triggered the close handler before the dropdown settled. Fixed by wrapping scroll/resize listener registration in `setTimeout(0)` (same guard pattern as click-outside), ensuring any scroll from initial render fires before listeners are active.
- **Checkbox visibility fix:** unchecked checkbox was invisible against the page background because it used `bg-background`. Changed to `bg-foreground/5` (same tint as `UiInput`) so the checkbox border and fill area are always visible on any background color or theme.

### v1.5.0
- **Theme `3df`:** nuevo tema de color alternativo `light`/`dark`. Aplica clase `.theme-3df` al `<html>` para activar una paleta de verde bosque oscuro (`--color-primary: hsl(150 40% 30%)`). Disponible vía `use3dfConfig()` con `theme: '3df'` o `applyTheme('3df')`. El 3DF Customizer expone un selector de 4 opciones: Light ☀️ · Dark 🌙 · System 🖥️ · 3DF 🌿.
- **Checkbox `size` prop:** añadido prop `size` con valores `sm` (`size-3.5`), `default` (`size-4`), `lg` (`size-5`). Escalado uniforme del wrapper, el input y los overlays SVG.
- **Checkbox `indeterminate` prop:** estado indeterminado (guión horizontal) para patrones de selección parcial / select-all.
- **Combobox rewrite:** componente reescrito como auto-contenido (`useFloatingPosition` + `useFloatingLifecycle` + Teleport). Elimina dependencia interna de `UiPopoverTrigger`. El ancho del dropdown se ajusta al trigger (`triggerWidth`). Soporte para `disabled` por opción individual.

### v1.4.6
- **CardContent padding:** removed hardcoded `pt-0`/`sm:pt-0` from default classes. `CardContent` now uses full `p-3 sm:p-6` padding by default. Cards with a `CardHeader` above can override with `class="pt-0"`.
- **CommandPalette Enter fix:** `onSelectItem` now correctly resolves items selected via the Enter key. Previously, `UiCommand` emitted the internal `searchableValue` string on Enter (e.g. `/ui/button Button Navegación`) instead of the original `item.value`, causing `findItem()` to return `null` and navigation to silently fail. Fixed with a dual-lookup: `findItem(value) ?? searchableToItem.get(value)`.
- **CommandPalette empty groups:** groups with no visible items are now automatically hidden during search (`v-show="isGroupVisible(group)"`). Group headers no longer appear as orphaned labels when all their items are filtered out.
- **CommandPalette keyboard hints footer:** added a footer bar at the bottom of the dialog with `↑↓` navigate · `↵` select · `esc` close keyboard hints.
- **CommandPalette search sync:** `localSearch` ref added and synced via `v-model` on `UiCommandInput` to power the group visibility logic independently of internal UiCommand state.

### v1.4.2
- **CommandPalette:** nuevo componente de alto nivel (`CommandPalette`) exportado desde `@3df/ui`. Layout de panel dividido con lista agrupada + slot `#preview` totalmente personalizable.
- **CommandPaletteItem / CommandPaletteGroup:** tipos TypeScript exportados para tipar los datos del consumer.
- **UiCommand auto-selección:** el primer ítem visible se selecciona automáticamente al abrir (`watch(visibleValues)`).
- **CommandList altura:** corregido bug donde `sm:max-h-[20rem]` limitaba la altura aunque el consumer pasara `max-h-none`. Ahora se requiere `sm:max-h-none` para override completo.
- **Demo:** añadida ruta `/ui/command-palette` con ejemplo live, tabla de slots y tabla de props.

### v1.4.1
- **Sidebar color:** `--sidebar` referencia `var(--background)` — el sidebar siempre coincide con el fondo del tema.
- **Sidebar layout:** eliminado `position: fixed`. El sidebar es ahora un flex child en-flujo (`shrink-0 h-svh`), corrigiendo el bug donde cubría el contenido.
- **Sidebar sin mobile:** eliminada toda la lógica mobile interna (Sheet, Teleport, matchMedia, body.overflow). `SidebarMobileTrigger` eliminado. El consumer gestiona mobile a su manera.
- **Sidebar sin collapsible en base:** nueva arquitectura `BaseSidebarContext` (solo `side` + `variant`). El collapsible queda para una futura variante dedicada.
- **SidebarTrigger / SidebarRail:** ahora emiten evento `toggle` en lugar de gestionar estado interno.
- **Playground:** sidebar oculto en tablet/mobile (`hidden lg:flex`), hamburger + Sheet para navegación mobile, search movido al navbar.
- **i18n:** añadidas keys `demo.nav.documentation`, `demo.nav.support`, `demo.nav.whatsNew` en `en` y `es`.

### v1.3.4
- **Sidebar border:** panel usa `border-r-ui`/`border-l-ui` (var(--border), customizer-aware). Eliminado `border-sidebar-border`.
- **Sidebar mobile sheet:** añadido border con `border-r-ui`/`border-l-ui`.
- **SidebarMobileTrigger:** nuevo componente exportado desde `@3df/ui`. Botón hamburger solo visible en móvil.
- **Playground:** layout refactorizado para usar componentes nativos de `@3df/ui` (SidebarProvider, SidebarMenuButton :as=RouterLink, SidebarTrigger, SidebarInset).
- **Responsive:** 20+ componentes mejorados (Badge, Tabs, Slider, Breadcrumb, Accordion, Banner, Menubar, Pagination, Command, Sonner, etc.).
- **UiCard:** añadido `overflow-hidden min-w-0 w-full`; padding responsive `p-3 sm:p-6` en Header/Content/Footer; `break-words` en Title/Description.

---

## Rules for AI Assistants

1. **Always import from `@3df-spa/ui` or `@3df-spa/charts`** — never from internal paths
2. **All components accept `class` prop** for Tailwind customization via tailwind-merge
3. **Use `as-child` prop** on triggers to render as a custom element instead of the default button
4. **Dark mode**: add `.dark` class to `<html>` element
5. **Never use `!important`** — use tailwind-merge via `class` prop instead
6. **Charts need a height** — always add a height class (e.g., `class="h-64"`) to chart components
7. **TooltipProvider** must wrap all Tooltip usage (place once high in the component tree)
8. **Toaster** must be placed once in App.vue for `toast()` to work
9. **Carousel requires `embla-carousel`** — included automatically as a dependency of `@3df-spa/ui`, no manual install needed
10. **Calendar/DatePicker require `date-fns`** — included automatically as a dependency of `@3df-spa/ui`, no manual install needed
11. **use3dfConfig()** debe llamarse una sola vez en App.vue si se quiere persistencia de personalización
12. **Toast** es custom (`@3df-spa/ui`) — NO instalar ni importar `vue-sonner`
13. **CommandList** no tiene max-height por defecto — añadir clase de altura si se usa fuera de CommandDialog
14. **Peer dependencies are bundled** — `@3df-spa/ui` ships `embla-carousel` and `date-fns` as regular dependencies. Consumers do NOT need to install them separately.
